# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## [0.6.0] - 2026-02-14

### 🚀 Features

- Add Cleanup and Helper methods to TestContext interface
- Make SerenityTest.Shutdown optional and idempotent, remove mandatory defer usage

### 🧪 Testing

- Add t.Helper and cleanup to SerenityTest constructors

### ⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

- Cleanup test artifacts and add t.Helper() calls
- *(release)* Update changelog for v0.6.0 [skip ci]

### Build

- Update go:generate to use go run mockgen@latest
